description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a polymer frame and a matte black metal slide, featuring a two-tone color scheme with a tan grip and lower frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured with finger grooves and a textured surface for enhanced handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide has visible serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and there are distinct markings including a model number and manufacturer logo. The barrel is standard length, flush with the slide, and the front and rear sights are integrated into the top of the slide. The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, matching the grip's color and texture. Overall, the handgun exhibits a modern, utilitarian design typical of law enforcement or civilian self-defense firearms.
description: A modern, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a tan textured grip and matte black slide, featuring ergonomic finger grooves and visible slide markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan grip with finger grooves, black slide with serrations, and visible model markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the slide, rear sight, and the textured backstrap of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide release, ejection port, and the ergonomic contouring of the grip.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, front sight, and the squared-off slide profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is tan-colored, ergonomically contoured with pronounced finger grooves and a stippled texture for secure handling. It appears to be made of durable polymer, with a slightly flared base for improved control. The backstrap is textured for additional grip, and there are no visible logos or embellishments on the grip itself.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth finish and moderate thickness. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and features a subtle undercut at the rear for enhanced grip comfort. There are no visible reinforcements or accessory rails integrated into the guard.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, non-threaded profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or external threads, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features engraved markings including the manufacturer's logo, the model number '17', and additional text likely indicating the caliber and origin. These markings are recessed and finished in a subtle, non-contrasting color, making them visible but not overly prominent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, matching the tan color of the grip. It has a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal, with a smooth surface and no visible finger rest, logos, or additional texturing.
